reviews.comment:
Servicompra se merecen un 10 en todo,atención muy buena,siempre amables además veo que brindan buena información al turista.

(Translated by Google)
Servicompra deserves a 10 in everything, very good service, always friendly, and I also see that they provide good information to tourists.

reviews.comment:
Ypf tomó la decisión de no proveer de ciertos combustibles a las distintas esta iones de servicio del país. Por lo tanto uno tiene q andar de un lado a otro buscando el combustible que necesita

(Translated by Google)
YPF has decided not to supply certain fuels to various service stations across the country. Therefore, one has to go from station to station looking for the fuel they need.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSN2F2UFVREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lento

(Translated by Google)
Very slow
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSemZUaUhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Todo bien pero que casualidad decían que no había nafta súper.sera por el feriado y por mucho turistas extranjeros.yo estando en la fila vi muchos coches argentinos pegando la vuelta sin cargar combustible de ser cierto no cuesta nada poner un cartel que diga no hay nafta súper así muchos no pierden o perdemos tiempo.En fin estamos en Argentina no.
.

(Translated by Google)
Everything's fine, but what a coincidence that they said there was no premium gasoline. It must be because of the holiday and all the foreign tourists. While I was in line, I saw many Argentine cars turning around without filling up. If that's true, it wouldn't cost anything to put up a sign saying "No premium gasoline" so many people don't waste time. Anyway, we're in Argentina, right?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSOVpya21nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mucha cola, demasiado tranquilos los playeros/as. Empecé la cola en el semáforo.

(Translated by Google)
Lots of queues, beachgoers too calm. I started in line at the traffic light.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSMllyN3RnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nunca tienen super, tienen un tanque re chico, y cuando llega la nafta parece mad max, y encima a los no Argentinos ni les venden super y ni alcanza para los del barrio. Haces una fila de 30min y recién cuando estás para cargar te avisan que no hay super. Y un solo personal para 20 autos. Hice casi 2000 kms y probablemente sea la peor ypf del país.

(Translated by Google)
They never have premium gasoline, their tanks are tiny, and when the gas finally arrives it's like Mad Max. On top of that, they don't even sell premium to non-Argentinians, and there's not enough for the locals either. You wait in line for 30 minutes and only when you're about to fill up do they tell you there's no premium. And there's only one employee for 20 cars. I drove almost 2000 km and it's probably the worst YPF station in the country.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSeVpyVTdRRRAB
